name: io.operandi/operandi
description: Identify an appliance and pull its grounded, safety-checked, robot-executable operation package. Cold, frontier models give confidently wrong physical instructions ~24% of the time; grounded in OPERANDI, 0.

environment_variables.name: OPERANDI_API_URL
environment_variables.description: Base URL of the OPERANDI API (default https://api.operandi.cc; use your hosted URL in prod).

environment_variables.name: OPERANDI_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your OPERANDI API key (from the dev portal). Sent as Authorization: Bearer.
